creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #41)

May be that is just the ports snapshot it was working
from being older than, for example, the bootstrap update.

(main-arm64-default and then main-armv7-default use the same
snapshot as a pair but bulk -a times are longer than for
amd64 so the time frame ends up being older for
main-armv7-default by the time it actually starts its
build.)
